HGSS.324.0000:
Don’t be afraid. I’m not a bad person.\f
A place like this...
attracts mean people.\f
They would eventually cause trouble...\f
That’s why Uncle Rage is watching for
such things...\f
The echo at the Underground Path is...
amazing...
HGSS.324.0001:
Don’t be afraid. I’m not a bad person.\f
A place like this...
attracts mean people.\f

HGSS.324.0002:
Aha!
That’s a RageCandyBar!\f
Can I have it?
Please! [0200,0000]
HGSS.324.0003:
[0103,0000,0000] gave the RageCandyBar
to the guy at the Underground Path.\f
HGSS.324.0004:
Munch!\f
How upsetting!\f
But this is so good!\f
Munch munch!\f
Aargh! Makes me mad!\f
Munch munch!\f
Aargh...\f
..................Phew!\f
I am feeling much better.
Thank you for your candy!\r
I want you to have this!\f
